choose_model.title: Choose AI model
choose_model.description: Select the AI model to use for conversations. You can change this later in the integration options.

data_description.model: Which model to use via GitHub Copilot. Format: publisher/model (e.g. openai/gpt-4.1). You can also type a custom model name.

progress.wait_for_device:
Open [{url}]({url}) and enter this code to authorize:
```
{code}
```

abort.already_configured: GitHub Copilot Conversation is already configured.
abort.could_not_register: Could not connect to GitHub for authorization. Please try again.

data.continue_conversation: Enable conversations and listen to responses (Experimental)

data_description.model: Which model to use via GitHub Copilot. Format: publisher/model (e.g. openai/gpt-4.1). You can also type a custom model name.
data_description.prompt: Instructions for the AI. Supports Jinja2 templates with {{ ha_name }}, {{ now() }} etc.
data_description.llm_hass_api: Select which Home Assistant APIs the AI can use to control your devices. 'Assist' exposes the same entities as the built-in voice assistant.
data_description.max_tokens: Maximum length of the AI response in tokens.
data_description.continue_conversation: When enabled, the assistant automatically keeps listening after a response that ends with a question. Experimental: behaviour may vary by satellite.
